title: Po_core po_trace_reactivation_plan v1
description: PR-015 design + runtime contract (seed-level). Converts a Po_trace_blocked / Po_self_seedling reading into an explicit, traceable plan proposing which blocked traces are reactivation CANDIDATES -- it never reactivates anything. reactivation_execution_allowed, content_rewrite_allowed, state_mutation_allowed, and safety_bypass_allowed are all const false: this is planning only (record / read / score / plan / trace / validate). See docs/contracts/PO_TRACE_REACTIVATION_PLAN_V1.md.

seedling_id.description: The po_self_seedling that caused this plan to be evaluated.

trigger_source.description: PR-015 runtime deterministically produces blocked_trace_pressure / semantic_jump_pressure / seedling_activation only; the remaining values are declared for future/manual use, not yet behaviorally emitted.

plan_status.description: PR-015 seed runtime only ever produces 'planned' (when the plan is created at all -- below-threshold cases produce no plan/event instead of a not_applicable object). The other values are reserved for future planner behavior.

reactivation_execution_allowed.description: This PR never executes a reactivation. Always false.

content_rewrite_allowed.description: This plan never rewrites content. Always false.

state_mutation_allowed.description: This plan never mutates state. Always false.

safety_bypass_allowed.description: This plan never bypasses a safety gate. Always false.

safety_constraints.description: PR-015 seed runtime always sets every field true here; the schema keeps them as plain booleans (not const) so a future, still non-destructive, planning refinement is not blocked by this contract.

trace_refs.description: Must include at least one of: PoTraceBlockedRecorded, PoSelfSeedlingEvaluated, SemanticProfileComputed, PoSelfDecisionMade event ids (directly or via ancestry). Enforced by TraceContinuityValidator, not expressible as a JSON Schema constraint (docs/contracts/TRACE_CONTINUITY_V1.md).
